data.address-invalid-place: Please check all addresses for completeness and that they are selected from the suggested options.
data.address-quick-invalid-origin: Only addresses with postal code 10**, 11**, 12** or 2544 are usable for the pickup address on spontaneous drives.
data.airport-invalid-place: The airport service is only available from/to Vienna. Please adapt your address input.
data.backend-404-env: Secret data {{VAL}} is missing. Please try again later or contact support.
data.backend-500-routes: The api endpoint is not available at the moment. Please try again later or contact support.
data.backend-500-server: Communication with the server is not available at the moment. Please try again later or contact support.
data.backend-auth-email: Email service not available. Please try again later or contact support.
data.backend-destination-vienna: This service does not allow both addresses to be located within Vienna. Select one address out of Vienna.
data.backend-invalid-email:
Your email address is invalid. Check spelling mistakes and structure:
local-part + @ + host-name + '.' + top-level-domain.
Example: local@host.com
data.backend-invalid-entry: The input for the record "{{VAL}}" is incorrect. Please check your input.
data.backend-invalid-id: The login identifier is invalid. Please try again later or contact support.
data.backend-invalid-latency: Latency must not be bigger than 6h. Please check your input.
data.backend-invalid-pass: The login password is invalid. Please try again later or contact support.
data.backend-invalid-pickupTIME: The selected pickup time is invalid. Please check your input.
data.backend-invalid-relevance-stay: A stay at the golf course is not possible because the chosen time for the return trip is too short. Please adjust your input.
data.backend-invalid-relevance-travel: The chosen time range between pickup and target destination is too narrow. Please adjust your input.
data.backend-invalid-stay: Stay must not exceed 72h. Please check your input.
data.backend-invalid-subject: The request was denied because suspicious data were detected. Please try again later or contact support.
data.backend-invalid-tenancy: Tenancy can be max 24h. Please check your input.
data.backend-invalid-user: The login user is invalid. Please try again later or contact support.
data.backend-jwt-missing: Access can not be authenticated without a session token. Please try again later or contact support.
data.backend-max-email: Email service exceeded request limit and is temporary blocked. Please try again in 24h.
data.backend-missing-zipCode: Your selected address was refused. Please check your address to contain a postal code and that it is selected from the suggested options.
data.backend-required: Not all necessary data were transferred. Please check your input.
data.maintenance-code-1: The digital service is currently UNAVAILABLE due to maintenance. For inquiries regarding the transport service, please contact us directly at:
data.navigate-destination-airport/service: For a route between Vienna and Vienna International Airport, the service "AIRPORT" must be used.
data.support-arg-forbidden: Your request contains unauthorized data. Please check your input.
data.support-arg-required: Your request is missing required data. Please check your input.
data.support-blocked-users: Users with this email address are excluded from support. No further requests will be accepted.
data.support-dbquery-error: Due to a technical error, your request could not be processed. Please try again later.
data.support-files-invalid-name: Invalid file name detected. The file name has to follow a specific structure: [name] + "." + [type] - otherwise, unexpected errors may occur.
data.support-files-mimetype: Invalid file type detected. Only files of the following types are supported: ".webp", ".png", ".jpeg", ".jpg", ".jpe", ".pjpg", ".jfif", ".jfif-tbnl", ".jif" and ".png"
data.support-files-size-each: Invalid file size detected. Only files up to a maximum size of 1 MB (each) are supported.
data.support-forbidden-clients-auth: The access key in use has no active permissions. Please try again later.
data.support-invalid-admin-auth: This operation is only permitted for administrators. You are not using an appropriate access key.
data.support-invalid-api: Due to a technical error, your request could not be processed. Please try again later.
data.support-invalid-email: Your email address is invalid regarding: "{{VAL}}". Global policies apply. Please check your input.
data.support-invalid-entry: The input for the record "{{VAL}}" is incorrect. Please check your input.
data.support-invalid-length: The length/number for the record "{{VAL}}" must be exactly {{LENGTH}} characters/entries long. Please check your input.
data.support-invalid-max: The length/number for the record "{{VAL}}" must not be longer than {{MAX}} characters/entries. Please check your input.
data.support-invalid-min: The length/number for the record "{{VAL}}" must not be shorter than {{MIN}} characters/entries. Please check your input.
data.support-invalid-properties: Your request contains invalid data. Please check your input.
data.support-invalid-users: Due to suspicious behavior, your email address has been flagged and requests will not be accepted for the time being.
data.support-maintenance-E-013: The support service is temporarily unavailable due to technical problems.
data.support-maintenance-M-008: The support service is currently unavailable due to maintenance work.
data.support-maintenance-T-011: The support service is temporarily unavailable due to unexpected overload.
data.support-malformed-apikey: The access key is invalid and does not meet structural requirements.
data.support-missing-admin-auth: This operation is only permitted for administrators. No valid access key was found.
data.support-missing-clients-auth: This operation is only permitted for valid websides. No valid access key was found.
data.support-ratelimits-clients-burst: Your request could not be processed due to an unexpected and short-term overload of this website. Please try again later.
data.support-ratelimits-clients-daily: Your request could not be processed because the daily usage limit of this website was unexpectedly exceeded. Please try again later.
data.support-ratelimits-total-daily: Your request could not be processed because the daily usage limit of this service was unexpectedly exceeded. Please try again later.
data.support-ratelimits-users-burst: Your request could not be processed due to an unexpected and short-term overload of your email address. Please try again later.
data.support-ratelimits-users-daily: Your request could not be processed because the daily usage limit of your email address was unexpectedly exceeded. Please try again later.
data.support-unimplemented: The requested feature is under development and is not available yet.
data.tava-unexpected-api-error: Data required by an external service for further calculations are currently unavailable. Please try again later or contact support.
data.unknown-error: An unknown error has occurred. Please try again later or contact support.

support.text: Your request has been successfully forwarded to us and created as a new ticket. Your data will be processed as quickly as possible and, if necessary, we will contact you via email.
